mapper.select: SELECT id, table_code, field, title, data_type, form_type, dict_type, show_in_list, show_in_form, show_in_export, searchable, is_sortable, required, width, sort_order, remarks, status, rules_json, placeholder, component_props, data_source, api_url, label_field, value_field, section_key, section_title, section_order, section_type, section_open, column_name, default_value, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM sys_column_meta WHERE table_code = #{tableCode} AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT id, table_code, field, title, data_type, form_type, dict_type, show_in_list, show_in_form, show_in_export, searchable, is_sortable, required, width, sort_order, remarks, status, rules_json, placeholder, component_props, data_source, api_url, label_field, value_field, section_key, section_title, section_order, section_type, section_open, column_name, default_value, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM sys_column_meta WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_column_meta ( table_code, field, title, data_type, form_type, dict_type, show_in_list, show_in_form, show_in_export, searchable, is_sortable, required, width, sort_order, remarks, status, rules_json, placeholder, component_props, data_source, api_url, label_field, value_field, section_key, section_title, section_order, section_type, section_open, column_name, default_value, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{tableCode}, #{field}, #{title}, #{dataType}, #{formType}, #{dictType}, #{showInList}, #{showInForm}, #{showInExport}, #{searchable}, #{sortable}, #{required}, #{width}, #{sortOrder}, #{remarks}, #{status}, #{rulesJson}, #{placeholder}, #{componentProps}, #{dataSource}, #{apiUrl}, #{labelField}, #{valueField}, #{sectionKey}, #{sectionTitle}, #{sectionOrder}, #{sectionType}, #{sectionOpen}, #{columnName}, #{defaultValue}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_column_meta SET field = #{field}, title = #{title}, data_type = #{dataType}, form_type = #{formType}, dict_type = #{dictType}, show_in_list = #{showInList}, show_in_form = #{showInForm}, show_in_export = #{showInExport}, searchable = #{searchable}, is_sortable = #{sortable}, required = #{required}, width = #{width}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, remarks = #{remarks}, status = #{status}, rules_json = #{rulesJson}, placeholder = #{placeholder}, component_props = #{componentProps}, data_source = #{dataSource}, api_url = #{apiUrl}, label_field = #{labelField}, value_field = #{valueField}, section_key = #{sectionKey}, section_title = #{sectionTitle}, section_order = #{sectionOrder}, section_type = #{sectionType}, section_open = #{sectionOpen}, column_name = #{columnName}, default_value = #{defaultValue}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
